preBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
preBattle.text: Stage 2 opens over the flood channel. Visibility is bad, and the formation ahead is tighter than the last run.

preBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
preBattle.text: Expect more pressure from the side lanes. Keep the center clear, save one bomb for the command craft, and don't drift too wide.

preBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
preBattle.text: If this flow survives Stage 2, we can trust the current data model for a longer campaign chain.

postBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
postBattle.text: Good. Stage 2 held together without the flow collapsing, and that's exactly what this prototype needed to prove.

postBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
postBattle.text: Next we can start translating the same stage data into Unity objects instead of rebuilding the rules by hand.
